# Security Policy

This is an **unofficial, community-maintained** repository of EspControl
firmware for devices the upstream project does not officially support. It is
not affiliated with or supported by
[upstream EspControl](https://github.com/jtenniswood/espcontrol).

## Scope

Firmware here is built in public CI from upstream's unmodified source at a
pinned release, plus the device configurations in this repo. Reports about
EspControl's core behaviour should go upstream; reports specific to a
community device, this repo's tooling, or its published firmware belong here.

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please report suspected security issues **privately** rather than opening a
public issue:

- Use GitHub's **[Report a vulnerability](https://github.com/lamiskin/espcontrol-community-devices/security/advisories/new)**
  (Security → Advisories) to open a private advisory.

Please include the affected device or component, a description, and steps to
reproduce if you have them. As a volunteer project, response is best-effort —
there are no guaranteed timelines.

## Supported versions

Only the latest community release receives fixes. Older releases are not
maintained. If a fix requires an upstream change, it will follow upstream's
release into a new pinned community build.
